title: People Place Pack #2 - Waterworld
description: An ocean-themed modpack with a focus on being good for multiplayer servers.
body:
![People Place 2 - Waterworld logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a685eeca4b3a53a51fb4b55659f69c0cb8e69a0a.png)
# People Place Pack #2 - Waterworld
This is the second modpack made for a private multiplayer server "People Place", released for ease of access. The modpack is centered around water and ocean themed structures, items, technology, and exploration, and is made to have something for most playstyles, suited for a multiplayer server.
